scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && concurrently -n 'api,web' -c 'green,magenta' 'uv run uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/api --reload --reload-dir apps/api/app --port 8000' 'pnpm --filter web dev'
scripts.worker: docker compose up -d && uv run --project . celery -A app.core.celery_app:celery_app --workdir apps/api worker --loglevel=info
scripts.beat: docker compose up -d && uv run --project . celery -A app.core.celery_app:celery_app --workdir apps/api beat --loglevel=info
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check apps/api && uv run ruff format --check apps/api && uv run mypy apps/api/app
